events.title: US Strikes Iran Following Retaliation
events.desc: The U.S. military conducted fresh strikes on Iran hours after President Donald Trump declared an interim agreement to end the war with Iran was over. The strikes targeted missile sites and command centers, aiming to degrade Iran's ability to threaten freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Iran Strikes US Military Targets in Gulf
events.desc: Iranian armed forces launched attacks on U.S. military infrastructure in neighbouring Gulf states following U.S. strikes on Iran. This action further strains a three-week-old ceasefire agreement between the two nations.

events.title: Ukraine Targets Russian Oil Facilities
events.desc: Ukraine conducted drone attacks targeting two oil tankers in the Sea of Azov and several oil facilities across Russia, signaling continued Ukrainian efforts to disrupt Russian energy infrastructure.

events.title: Iranian Missiles Intercepted Over Jordan
events.desc: Sirens sounded across several cities in Jordan as Iranian missiles were intercepted in the skies. The incident highlights the volatile regional security situation and the reach of Iranian missile capabilities.

events.title: Air Raid Sirens in Bahrain Amid US-Iran Tensions
events.desc: Following a tense night of overnight U.S.-led strikes on Iran, air raid alerts sounded across Gulf states, including Bahrain, underscoring the heightened regional security concerns and the potential for wider conflict.

events.title: Bomb Blasts in Damascus During Macron's Visit
events.desc: Bomb explosions injured 18 people in Damascus, Syria, occurring during French President Macron's visit. State television reported that Syrian President Assad welcomed Macron at the presidential palace amidst the incident.

events.title: Deadliest Israeli Attack on Lebanon Since Ceasefire
events.desc: An Israeli attack in Lebanon resulted in the deaths of four individuals, including a headteacher, traveling in a car. This incident marks the deadliest attack since the latest ceasefire went into effect.

events.title: US Strikes Iranian Nuclear and Military Sites
events.desc: The U.S. military conducted strikes targeting Iranian nuclear sites, ballistic missile infrastructure, and naval bases. These actions are part of the ongoing conflict and escalation between the United States and Iran.

events.title: Somali Pirates Resurface
events.desc: Recent pirate attacks, including the hijacking of three merchant vessels off the Horn of Africa, indicate a resurgence of Somali piracy. The conditions that allowed for piracy's previous dormancy have re-emerged, posing a threat to maritime shipping.

events.title: Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping Remains
events.desc: Despite shifting global attention, the Houthi threat to maritime shipping in the Red Sea and potentially other vital waterways persists. A review of previous analyses suggests the international response has been inadequate.

events.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates Over Shipping
events.desc: The U.S. military conducted fresh strikes on Iran, hours after President Trump declared an interim agreement to end the war was 'over.' The strikes targeted Iranian capabilities to threaten freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz, following Iran's attacks on U.S. military sites in the Gulf.

events.title: Pentagon AI Strategy Faces Funding Challenges
events.desc: The Pentagon's ambitious Artificial Intelligence strategy, backed by recent executive orders, faces significant execution hurdles due to a fiscal squeeze on Fiscal Year 2026 operations and maintenance accounts, potentially stalling its adoption.

events.title: Gathering Clouds: Building Digital Strategic Depth
events.desc: The wars in Ukraine and the Middle East highlight the vulnerability of digital infrastructure, including data centers and cloud regions, which have become critical to military power and economic prosperity. They are now attractive targets for cyber capabilities.

events.title: Syria Regains Voting Rights at Chemical Weapons Watchdog
events.desc: Member states of the Organisation for the Prohibition of Chemical Weapons (OPCW) reinstated Syria's voting rights, citing a 'significant change in circumstances' since the fall of the Assad regime. Syria had its rights revoked in 2021.

events.title: US Strikes Target Iranian Maritime Threat Capabilities
events.desc: The U.S. military conducted strikes aimed at degrading Iran's ability to threaten freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz. Central Command stated these actions hold Iran accountable for recent aggression against commercial shipping.
